title: Monday API to support Custom Key
excerpt:
We are working with Monday APIs and we also implemented the Custom Key. 
Monday API currently works only with Item ID. 
Are you planning to support custom keys as well in the API?

posts.author: Merav (Merav)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are working with Monday APIs and we also implemented the Custom Key.
Monday API currently works only with Item ID.
Are you planning to support custom keys as well in the API?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
What do you mean by custom key?

If this is something many developers from our ecosystem ask for, we’ll try to push it onto our roadmap!
